items.title: Trump Says Khamenei Killed In U.S.-Israeli Attacks On Iran. How Will Dow Jones Futures React?
items.description: The U.S. and Israel are attacking Iran. President Trump says Ayatollah Khamenei has been killed. How will Dow Jones futures and oil react?

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway’s CEO Suggests These 4 Companies Are Forever Stocks
items.description: Greg Abel identified four large Berkshire equity investments—Apple, American Express, Coca Cola and Moody’s—and suggested they are forever stocks, or close to it.

items.title: Cross Staff Loads Up on 289,000 Shares of AKRE
items.description: This asset management firm targets high-quality U.S. equities through a disciplined, valuation-driven investment approach.

items.title: Prediction: This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Will Join Nvidia, Apple, and Alphabet in the $3 Trillion Club Before 2028
items.description: One particular member of the "Magnificent Seven" is valued at a discount compared to its peers, but that could change swiftly.

items.title: Stock Market Week: Reaction To Iran, Berkshire Earnings, Apple Event
items.description: The coming week's stock market action will largely revolve around investor response to Saturday's U.S.-Israeli attack on Iran.
